meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit to overcome the no portfolio trap. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your MVP faster.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders don't need a resume, they need revenue. By utilizing a SaaS starter kit, you bypass months of boilerplate development. Combine Antigravity’s architecture with Claude Code’s rapid iteration to ship a high-fidelity MVP in days, proving your capability through live, profitable software.
content.intro:
The screen stares back, a blank canvas of unwritten code. You have the vision for a disruptive SaaS, but your portfolio is empty, and the market doesn't care about your potential—it cares about your output. Every day you spend fighting framework configuration or auth-flows is a day your competitors are capturing your early adopters.

Stop building from scratch. The transition from 'aspiring founder' to 'shipped operator' happens the moment you stop treating code as a craft project and start treating it as a business asset. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you reclaim your velocity and force the market to acknowledge your product, not your resume.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using a high-performance starter kit to ensure authentication, billing, and database schemas are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready SaaS starter kit with Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase, and Stripe integration. Prioritize modularity for future feature expansion.

steps.title: Define the Database Schema
steps.description: Model your data to support rapid iterations. Focus on essential CRUD operations to keep your MVP lean and efficient.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for users, subscriptions, and core product entities with Row Level Security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate prisma schema with RLS for multi-tenant users"

steps.title: Implement Authentication Flow
steps.description: Use secure, industry-standard auth providers to ensure user data is protected from day one without writing custom security logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Supabase auth with magic links and OAuth providers. Ensure the middleware handles protected routes automatically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "setup supabase auth middleware and protected routes"

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Logic
steps.description: Don't build your own billing engine. Connect Stripe APIs to automate your revenue stream immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to sync subscription status with the Supabase users table. Ensure plan limits are enforced via middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "connect stripe webhooks to user subscription status"

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ship your code to a global edge network to ensure low latency and high availability for your first paying users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration and an automated GitHub Action for continuous deployment on push to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "configure cicd for vercel deployment"

pro_tips: Never build custom auth; use Clerk or Supabase to save 40+ hours of security debugging.
Ship the 'Happy Path' first; ignore edge cases until you have your first 10 paying customers.
Keep your database schema flat in the beginning to make pivot-related refactoring trivial.
Use feature flags to hide incomplete modules, allowing you to deploy frequently without breaking the UX.
Prioritize mobile responsiveness early; 60% of your initial B2B users will check your landing page on their phones.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus entirely on distribution. Do not add features until you have spoken to at least 20 potential customers to validate your pricing model.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop building 'projects' and start building a business. The only thing separating you from a successful exit is the courage to ship. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
